name: Confessions
short: Anonymous confession system with modal submission and a persistent button panel.
description: Lets server members submit anonymous confessions via a Discord modal, triggered by a slash command or a persistent button panel. Confessions are posted as numbered embeds to a configured channel. Admins can enable/disable the system, set the output channel, post a panel anywhere, and reset the counter.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not collect, store, or log any end user data. Confessions are posted anonymously and no user identifiers are retained.
author: hbicofbiology
install_msg:
Thanks for installing Confessions!

Quick setup:
1. `[p]confessions setchannel #your-channel` — set where confessions are posted.
2. `[p]confessions postpanel #another-channel` — drop a button panel wherever you like.
3. Done! Members can click the button or use `/confess`.

Run `[p]confessions` to see all admin commands.
